_comment: AutoKernel optimization plan — Qwen3.5-27B decode on gfx1201 (RDNA4).
_note: Targets ordered by Amdahl decode impact. Update after each accepted candidate.
amdahl_formula: e2e_speedup = 1 / ((1 - f) + f / s)  where f=decode_fraction, s=kernel_speedup

targets.reason_selected: 20% of decode cycles (Amdahl #1). 1.3x on this kernel = 1.055x end-to-end. Phase 12 confirmed bandwidth ceiling at 8x unroll; launch-bounds / occupancy tuning unexplored.
targets.move_on_condition: 5 failed attempts OR all strategies exhausted without acceptance
targets.revisit_condition: If a different kernel is accepted and changes memory pressure significantly

targets.reason_selected: 18% of decode cycles (Amdahl #2). No arch variant exists — any positive change is a win.
targets.move_on_condition: 5 failed attempts OR all strategies exhausted
targets.revisit_condition: After gemv_hfq4g256 tuning — may share optimal launch bounds

targets.reason_selected: 12% of decode cycles (Amdahl #3). gfx1100 variant exists but gfx12 occupancy is different. Phase 10 showed s_prefetch is harmful; launch-bounds sweep is unexplored.
targets.revisit_condition: After gemv_hfq4g256 win confirms occupancy hypothesis

targets.reason_selected: 10% of decode cycles (Amdahl #4). No arch variant.
targets.revisit_condition: If gemv_hfq6g256 is accepted (likely share tuning)

targets.reason_selected: 8% of decode cycles (Amdahl #5). Fused 3-projection kernel — any ILP improvement helps.
targets.revisit_condition: If QKV structure changes in new model versions

targets.reason_selected: 12% decode + 8% prefill. Has arithmetic component (softmax, score computation) — RDNA4 wave32 and occupancy tuning may help beyond pure BW kernels.
targets.revisit_condition: After profiling confirms it is the arithmetic bottleneck at long context

targets.reason_selected: 6% decode cycles (Amdahl #7). Fused SwiGLU gate+up path.
4% decode (28 invocations per token — high frequency). Fused normalization+rotation path.
3% decode, 3% prefill. Invoked per-layer — cumulative impact.
